name: Cloudimage
description: Cloudimage — Image CDN with real-time resizing, format conversion, and watermarking via URL-based parameters.

seo.title: Cloudimage — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: Cloudimage: Cloudimage — Image CDN with real-time resizing, format conversion, and watermarking via URL-based parameters.

when_to_use: Real-time image resizing and format conversion via CDN URL
Serving optimized images from existing S3 or Azure storage
Automatic WebP/AVIF delivery with browser format detection
Watermarking and branding images dynamically at edge
Lazy-load optimized images for Core Web Vitals improvements

pros: URL-based image transforms, no code changes
AVIF and WebP auto format selection
cons: Smaller feature set than Cloudinary or imgix
Video handling limited compared to rivals
CDN coverage adequate but not best-in-class
review.verdict: Straightforward image CDN with good AVIF support, a budget alternative to Cloudinary for simpler needs.
review.best_for: Ecommerce or media sites needing basic on-the-fly image resizing at fair cost
review.not_for: Media-heavy platforms needing deep video transforms and advanced AI features
